title: Quebec Budget 2025-26: Refund of the Biodiesel  Fuel Tax Abolished
content: In Budget 2025-2026, the government is announcing the abolition of the measure concerning the refund of the biodiesel fuel tax. The Quebec Provincial Governemnt states that this measure has not achieved its objective of encouraging the use of biodiesel in QuÃ©bec and thus contributing to GHG reduction efforts, due to the small number of businesses using it and the small amounts involved. This measure will be abolished after the day of the budget speech, i.e. 26th March 2025.
author: Analysts Account
